title: Enhanced ping with 20-count default and latency graph
description:
Enhanced ping feature:
- Default to 20 pings (configurable via Settings-style row like competitor)
- Show real-time latency graph: line + area-fill chart, Y-axis in ms, sequential pings on X
- Stats summary above chart: Average, Min, Max (ms)
- Blue line with translucent area fill on dark background
- Handle first-ping spike gracefully in scale
- Reference: competitor screenshot saved at ~/.openclaw/workspace/competitor-ping.png
- Both iOS and macOS platforms

title: XCUITests - macOS App
description: Write comprehensive XCUITest coverage for the macOS app. Test all screens, navigation flows, user interactions. Covers: sidebar navigation, dashboard widgets, device list/detail, target management, all network tools (ping, traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, speed test, port scanner, bonjour, WOL), settings tabs, and menu bar popover. Tests should verify element presence, navigation, user input, and error states.

title: XCUITests - iOS App
description: Write comprehensive XCUITest coverage for the iOS app. Test all screens, navigation flows, user interactions, and liquid glass UI components. Covers: tab navigation, dashboard, device list/detail, network map, all tools (ping, traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, speed test, port scanner, bonjour, WOL, web browser), settings, Mac pairing, and reusable components. Tests should verify element presence, navigation, user input, and error states.

title: Accessibility Identifiers - macOS Views
description: Add comprehensive accessibility identifiers to ALL macOS SwiftUI views following {screen}_{element}_{descriptor} convention. Covers: ContentView, SidebarView, DashboardView, DevicesView, DeviceRowView, DeviceDetailView, TargetsView, TargetStatisticsView, ToolsView, all Tool views (Ping, Traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, SpeedTest, PortScanner, Bonjour, WakeOnLan), all Settings views (General, Appearance, Network, Notification, Companion, Monitoring, Data), MenuBarPopoverView, and shared components. Some views already have partial identifiers that need standardizing.

title: Multi-network scanning
description: Pick a router from the target screen to scan that network. Enable scanning multiple networks beyond the local one. User selects a router → app scans that router's network.

title: Accessibility Identifiers - iOS Views
description: Add comprehensive accessibility identifiers to ALL iOS SwiftUI views following {screen}_{element}_{descriptor} convention. Covers: ContentView, DashboardView, DeviceListView, DeviceDetailView, NetworkMapView, all Tool views (Tools, Ping, Traceroute, DNS, WHOIS, SpeedTest, PortScanner, Bonjour, WakeOnLAN, WebBrowser), Settings views (Settings, Acknowledgements, MacPairing), and all Components (ToolRunButton, ToolClearButton, ToolResultRow, ToolStatisticsCard, ToolInputField, GlassButton, EmptyStateView, MetricCard, StatusBadge).
close_reason: Accessibility identifiers added to all iOS SwiftUI views following {screen}_{element}_{descriptor} convention. Covers ContentView, Dashboard, DeviceDetail, NetworkMap, all Tools, Settings, and Components.

title: XCUITest Infrastructure Setup
description: Add bundle.ui-testing targets for both macOS and iOS to project.yml. Create test directories, configure schemes, and regenerate Xcode project. This blocks all UI test writing.
close_reason: XCUITest bundle.ui-testing targets added for both macOS and iOS. Directories created with base test files. Xcode project regenerated.
